name: Salmon Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Cream cheese (8 oz each), softened
1 can Salmon (5 1/2-7 1/2 oz.), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine cracker crumbs and melted margarine; press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes; cool.
3. In a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer, combine cream cheese, eggs, and 1/4 cup of sour cream; mix until well blended.
4. Add remaining ingredients; mix well.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Bake in a 325°F oven for 45 minutes.
7. Loosen the rim of the pan; cool before removing it.
8. Spread the remaining sour cream on top.
9. Serve with crackers or French bread.
